title: Postgrowth futures collective
text:
Through mutual aid, community organizing, and art, we re-imagine the future, or futures …
A future where we have enough
A future where we don’t need to fight for resources
A future where capital accumulation is not encouraged
A future where we share the gifts of nature and take care of the planet.
What happens when growth is not enough? What comes after?
Redistribution. There is enough for everyone.

title: About
text:
Post-growth Futures collective is a grassroots organization where, through mutual aid, community organizing and art, we imagine a better future, or futures:

A future where we have enough for everyone
A future where we don’t need to fight for resources
A future where capital accumulation is not encouraged
A future where we share the gifts of nature and take care of the planet.

title: Notes
text:
Postgrowth futures is a grassroots organization that provides a platform for re-imagining the future beyond capitalism. Through Art, mutual aid and community organizing, we create spaces to connect, enable dialog, inspire, and re envision well-being.
Mission:
Connect local organizations to broader efforts (i.e. YCP to Degrowth CA)
